animation.init_shortest: [Shortest Mode] Start finding the SHORTEST subarray with sum ≥ {{target}}
animation.init_longest: [Longest Mode] Start finding the LONGEST subarray with sum ≤ {{target}}
animation.expand_right: Right pointer expanded, shifted in value {{val}} at Index {{r}}
animation.check_while: Include {{val}} into the window, current window sum is: {{sum}}
animation.shrink_shortest: Sum satisfies condition ({{sum}} ≥ {{target}}). Try shrinking Left({{l}}) to find a shorter range
animation.shrink_longest: Sum {{sum}} exceeds target {{target}}! Shrinking Left({{l}}) to satisfy the condition
animation.update_shortest: Condition met! Updated minimum window length record to {{len}} (Index {{l}} to {{r}})
animation.update_longest: Condition met! Updated maximum window length record to {{len}} (Index {{l}} to {{r}})
animation.done_success: Scan complete! Optimal window length found is {{len}} from Index {{l}} to {{r}}
animation.done_fail: Scan complete! No continuous subarray matches the given condition.

ui.invalidInput: Please enter a valid target sum
